sprint.goal: False-positive cleanup sweep: #1113 (security_reminder_hook exits with error on GH Actions writes — change to warning) + KE-2 Canonical ActionContext design (v3.0 blocker). Prior sprint issues all closed or in final PR stage.
sprint.priorGoal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents: #1202 (KE-2 AAB normalization) → #1208 (heredoc false positive) → #1139 ($(date) command scanner allowlist). All DONE.

senior.title: #1113 — security_reminder_hook.py blocks Write to .github/workflows/*.yml instead of warning
senior.note: After #1255 merges. Fix: hooks/security_reminder_hook.py should exit 0 (warn) not non-zero (block). Low risk, low complexity. Root cause: PreToolUse hook returning error text blocks the tool call — should return advisory message with exit 0.

active_pr.title: PR #1255 — safe-subshell allowlist (closes #1139)
active_pr.note: Rebased by EM at 21:15Z onto origin/main (fa3c050). Post-rebase CI pending. 17 new tests, stripSafeSubshells() added to command-scanner.ts. Expected to pass — lint/test/analyze all passed pre-rebase. EM to merge when CI green.

prs.title: fix(matchers): safe-subshell allowlist — prevent $(date) false positives (closes #1139)
prs.note: Rebased by EM 21:15Z. 1 commit ahead of main. Only matchers files changed (command-scanner.ts + command-scanner.test.ts). Merge when CI clears.
